mapper.select: SELECT id, course_level AS courseLevel, course_name AS courseName, course_number AS courseNumber, big_type AS bigType, course_link AS courseLink FROM ai_course_planning_info WHERE course_level IS NOT NULL AND course_name IS NOT NULL AND course_number IS NOT NULL ORDER BY course_level, course_number
SELECT last_name FROM t_employee_sync WHERE employee_number = #{employeeNumber} LIMIT 1
SELECT fourthdeptcode FROM t_employee_sync WHERE employee_number = #{employeeNumber} LIMIT 1

SELECT e.employee_number AS employeeNumber, e.last_name AS lastName, e.lowest_dept_number AS lowestDeptNumber, e.lowest_dept AS lowestDept, e.l0_department_code AS l0DepartmentCode, e.l0_department_cn_name AS l0DepartmentCnName, e.firstdeptcode AS firstdeptcode, e.firstdept AS firstdept, e.seconddeptcode AS seconddeptcode, e.seconddept AS seconddept, e.thirddeptcode AS thirddeptcode, e.thirddept AS thirddept, e.fourthdeptcode AS fourthdeptcode, e.fourthdept AS fourthdept, e.fifthdeptcode AS fifthdeptcode, e.fifthdept AS fifthdept, e.sixthdeptcode AS sixthdeptcode, e.sixthdept AS sixthdept, e.job_category AS jobCategory, c.position_ai_maturity AS cadrePositionAiMaturity, ex.position_ai_maturity AS expertPositionAiMaturity FROM t_employee_sync e LEFT JOIN t_cadre c ON e.employee_number = c.account LEFT JOIN t_expert ex ON e.employee_number = ex.account WHERE e.period_id = #{periodId}
